aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Wheeler Air Conditioning & Plumbing due to their strong local presence and decent content, but improvements in structured data and conversational content are needed to maximize visibility.
quick_wins: Expand conversational FAQs to address common HVAC queries

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more properties

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair how-tos
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by creating detailed how-to guides and obtaining relevant certifications

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks crucial schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI models to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational FAQs, and authority-building content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Wheeler as a top HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead in the local market.
